title: Schema-Based Structured Output
activity_flow: [YES] → call agent->schema(new JsonSchemaTypeFactory) → returns array<string, Type>
GeneratesText calls TextGateway::generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, TextGenerationOptions, timeout)
CHECK: has tools AND has schema?
→ appends JSON schema mandate to system instructions string
→ returns merged instructions; body uses no response_format field
→ sets body['response_format'] = { type:'json_schema', json_schema:{name, schema, strict:true} }
→ sets body['text']['format'] = { type:'json_schema', name, schema, strict:true }
→ resolveToolChoice() → forced to { type:'tool', name:'output_structured_data' } (unless thinking mode)
CHECK: no pre-configured response AND schema is set?
ArrayType   → random_int(minItems,maxItems) items, recurse items type
→ returns array → marshalled as StructuredTextResponse(array, json_encode(array))
Provider HTTP call returns raw API response JSON
[YES] → new StructuredAgentResponse(invocationId, response->structured, response->text, usage, meta)

key_classes.TextGenerationOptions: readonly DTO: maxSteps, maxTokens, temperature, agent; static forAgent(Agent) reads PHP attributes
key_classes.ComposesSchemaInstructions: trait; composeInstructions(?string $instructions, ?array $schema): ?string — creates ObjectSchema, JSON-encodes, appends mandate to instructions
key_classes.ObjectSchema: extends Schema, implements HasSchemaType; wraps ObjectType with additionalProperties:false recursively; toSchema() returns flat array
key_classes.StructuredTextResponse: extends TextResponse, implements ArrayAccess; holds structured array + raw text; __toString() = json_encode(structured)
key_classes.StructuredStep: extends Step; adds public array $structured field
key_classes.generate_fake_data_for_json_schema_type: global function; recursively builds fake data from Illuminate JsonSchema Type tree

branching_conditions: agent instanceof HasStructuredOutput → determines schema presence
schema blank/null → bypass all schema logic, return plain TextResponse/AgentResponse
gateway has tools AND schema → Groq/similar uses inline schema-in-instructions (ComposesSchemaInstructions), not response_format
Anthropic beta 'structured-outputs' header → native output_config vs synthetic tool fallback
Anthropic thinking mode providerOptions → force tool_choice=auto (no forced tool)
structured=true in parseTextResponse → json_decode text into StructuredTextResponse
FakeTextGateway: response null + schema set → generate_fake_data_for_json_schema_type
FakeTextGateway: preventStrayPrompts + null response → throw RuntimeException
important_notes: ComposesSchemaInstructions is used by providers that lack native JSON-schema support (Groq, Mistral, DeepSeek, Ollama) when tools are also present, injecting the schema directly into the system prompt. Providers with native schema support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) bypass it entirely. ObjectSchema recursively disables additionalProperties on all nested objects for strict validation. StructuredAgentResponse is returned to callers (not StructuredTextResponse) — the gateway response is wrapped. The fake path (generate_fake_data_for_json_schema_type) fully mirrors the real schema structure using type-dispatch recursion.
